entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by anthracnose in West and Central Africa

entities.name: ANTHRACNOSE
entities.description: A significant foliar disease of sorghum caused by Colletotrichum graminicola

entities.name: COLLETOTRICHUM GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing anthracnose in sorghum

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where sorghum anthracnose is a major issue

entities.name: PATHOGENIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in the ability of the pathogen to cause disease

entities.name: GENOTYPIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic variation within the pathogen populations

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of how anthracnose spreads and is distributed in the region

entities.name: DISEASE MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches used to sustainably control and manage sorghum anthracnose

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of sorghum varieties to resist anthracnose infection

entities.name: CROP RESIDUE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing crop remains to reduce the inoculum of the pathogen
